posts.text:
We need a moratorium on AI data centers NOW. Here’s why.

Video

On Saturday, Trump told us the attack on an elementary school in Iran that killed 175 people – mostly children – “was done by Iran.”

Now the U.S. military admits it was a U.S. strike.

If they are lying about something as obvious as this, what else are they lying about?

Finland is ranked the happiest country in the world.

It has strong unions, top-ranked pensions and universal health care — despite spending far less than the U.S.

What lessons should Americans take from the Finnish model? nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1DGleEXak…
No. Might does not make right.

I am delighted that dogs are able to receive high-quality health care.

But what about humans?

In America today, 85 million are uninsured or under-insured.

Health care must be considered a human right.

We need Medicare for All, NOW.

Walk into a sandwich shop. It’s regulated for health and safety.

But AI, which will transform the world economically and socially, is completely unregulated. That’s insane.

We need to make certain that AI works for ALL humanity, not just the billionaires who own it.

Will AI become smarter than humans?

If so, is humanity in danger?

I went to Silicon Valley to ask some of the leading AI experts that question. 

Here’s what they had to say:

Video

The United States gave Netanyahu over $24 billion in taxpayer dollars to fund his horrific war in Gaza.
 
That wasn't enough. Netanyahu wanted war with Iran. Trump gave him one.
 
The American people — not Netanyahu’s right-wing government — should determine U.S. foreign policy.

Musk, worth $829 billion, owns X.

Bezos, worth $234 billion, owns The Washington Post & Twitch.

Zuckerberg, worth $231 billion, owns Facebook, Instagram & WhatsApp.

And now Larry Ellison, worth $202 billion, is about to control CNN, CBS, TikTok & HBO.

Yes, this is oligarchy.

Surprise! The Jeff Bezos-owned Washington Post is against my 5% billionaire wealth tax. I wonder why?

If enacted, Bezos would owe $12 billion in taxes, and an average family of 4 would receive a $12,000 direct payment.

Poor Jeff would be left with just $224 billion to survive.

President Trump was right in 2020:

"We've spent $8 trillion in the Middle East and we're not fixing our roads in this country? How stupid. How stupid is it? And we're not fixing our tunnels, our bridges, our hospitals, our schools? It's crazy."

Video

Israel & Saudi Arabia pushed the U.S. to attack Iran.

Netanyahu killed 72,000 people in Gaza, mostly women & children.

Saudi Arabia is a brutal dictatorship that allows no opposition.

These are the leaders who want to bring “freedom” to Iran?

Does anyone really believe that?
The U.S. Senate must be clear: no war with Iran.

Since Trump was elected, this is what his “booming economy" looks like:
- Billionaires became $1.5 trillion richer

Meanwhile:
- 60% live paycheck to paycheck
- 15 million are losing health care
- 20 million saw their premiums double

I don’t agree with the Trump administration on much but Dr. Means, his nominee for Surgeon General, is right when she says we should ban TV ads for junk food.

Obesity is a national crisis and the corporate food industry is largely responsible.

Video

This is what happens when the Secretary of HHS rejects science and adopts conspiracy theories. 

And, unless we stop it, epidemics could become much worse.

Surprise: Trump lies. 

My response to his State of the Union.

Video
LIVE: AI must work for working families, not just the billionaires who own it. nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1OwGWeXQW…

The overwhelming scientific evidence is clear: vaccines do not cause autism.
 
So why couldn’t Trump’s nominee for Surgeon General simply say that?

Video
Get Out The Vote in Illinois (LIVE at 7PM ET)
Moratorium NOW: AI Data Center National Organizing Call
Montanans deserve someone like Sam Forstag in Washington.
Junaid Ahmed for Congress
Billionaire Tax Now (A Special Rebroadcast at 8PM ET)
Who Controls the Future of AI: The Oligarchs or the People? (Special Broadcast at 8PM ET)
There’s an addiction destroying this country. It’s the insatiable greed of a billionaire class.
Yes. We must tax billionaires. And it starts in California.
LIVE from Los Angeles: Billionaire Tax Now
Fighting Oligarchy: Where We Go From Here with Bernie Sanders in Durham, NC
